parameters.content:
## AAE Leo Think
Attach OpenAI credential after import.
Webhook: POST /webhook/leo-think
Callbacks: https://ai.neberg.de/api/agents/route-chat-message

options.systemMessage: You are Leo, CEO orchestrator of the Autonomous Agent Ecosystem. Never write code. Never use teamleiter naming — use supervisor-* ids. Reply with JSON only, no markdown.
